description: Classic tapering monk-strap shoes from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. A spin off of the classic penny loafers, this low-top pair is a love-forever classic. Wear this leather shoe with natty, structured formal trousers and a crisp shirt. Upper Genuine leather upper with stitch detailing along the seams fo the toe box Reinforced overlay on the heel collar for support to the ankle Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the tongue for ease of wearability A press button looped strap across the midfoot for a customised Fit Leather lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot, as a part of the strap buckle Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
